experienceLevel.description: The experience level of a position or candidate.

iso8601.description: Similar to the standard date type, but each section after the year is optional. e.g. 2014-06-29 or 2023-04. The value can also be an empty string for ongoing dates.

jobType.description: The type of job this is, e.g. Full-time, part-time, contract, etc.

keywords.description: A list of keywords that are related to the parent object. Due to the nature of being keywords, the items within may have aliases attached. However, each item should appear ONCE and matched on using a separate dictionary to keep this array as slim as possible.

location.description: A location in the world. Can be a full address, a partial address, or simply a listing of the country and region.

address.description: The street name and number components of the location.

postalCode.description: Also known as a zip code for US addresses.

countryCode.description: Country code as per ISO-3166-1 ALPHA-2, e.g. US, AU, IN.

region.description: Can be a state, province, prefecture, oblast, etc.

masteryLevel.description: One of five mastery levels for a particular skill.

meta.description: The schema version and any other tooling configuration lives here.

canonical.description: URL (as per RFC 3986) to latest version of this document.

version.description: A version field which follows semver - e.g. `1.0.0`. Regexp is per the recommendation of semver.org
